name: AI Resume Builder
description: Create job-winning resumes with AI-powered suggestions and modern templates. Customize every section easily, optimize for applicant tracking systems, and export polished resumes that stand out to recruiters across different industries.

name: Website Builder Pro
description: Build responsive websites without coding using drag-and-drop tools. Choose from professionally designed templates, customize layouts visually, and publish your site with hosting and domain support included.

name: SEO Optimizer Toolkit
description: Boost your website ranking with advanced SEO insights and tracking. Analyze keywords, monitor competitors, and improve on-page SEO performance using actionable recommendations and real-time reports.

name: Social Media Scheduler
description: Plan, schedule, and automate posts across all major platforms. Manage multiple accounts, visualize content with a calendar view, and track engagement performance to grow your audience efficiently.

name: Email Marketing Pro
description: Create high-converting email campaigns with automation tools. Design beautiful emails, segment your audience, and track campaign performance with detailed analytics to maximize conversions.

name: UI Design System Kit
description: Pre-built UI components and design systems for faster development. Use ready-made assets, maintain design consistency, and speed up your workflow with reusable and scalable design elements.

name: AI Content Generator
description: Generate blogs, ads, and social media content in seconds. Save time on writing, produce high-quality content ideas, and customize outputs for different platforms and audiences easily.

name: Cloud Storage Plus
description: Secure cloud storage with fast access and file sharing. Store your files safely, sync across devices, and share documents easily with advanced privacy and backup features.

name: Freelancer Toolkit
description: All-in-one toolkit for freelancers to manage clients and projects. Create invoices, send proposals, and organize client communication efficiently to grow your freelance business.

name: Code Snippet Manager
description: Organize and reuse your code snippets efficiently. Store frequently used code, search quickly with tags, and sync across devices to improve your development workflow.

name: Analytics Dashboard Pro
description: Track and visualize your business data in real-time. Build custom dashboards, monitor key metrics, and generate reports to make data-driven decisions quickly.

name: Password Manager Secure
description: Store and manage your passwords with top-level encryption. Keep your accounts safe, auto-fill credentials securely, and access your data across multiple devices.

name: Online Course Builder
description: Create and sell online courses easily. Upload videos, manage students, and integrate payments to build a complete e-learning platform.

name: Project Management Tool
description: Manage tasks, teams, and deadlines efficiently. Use boards, collaborate with your team, and track progress to ensure projects are delivered on time.

name: API Testing Tool
description: Test and debug APIs with an easy-to-use interface. Send requests, analyze responses, and automate testing workflows to improve development efficiency.
